eventOwnerOverrides.reason: BookingCase creation stays in the kernel track.
Capability tuple resolution stays solely in the capability engine.
Slot fetch lifecycle truth belongs to the slot snapshot pipeline, not the BookingCase kernel.
Offer generation belongs to the ranking and orchestration track.
Selection rules belong to the offer orchestration track before hold and commit authority attach.
Commit-path revalidation belongs to the booking transaction track.
Failed revalidation is part of commit-path truth, not case-kernel generic state.
BookingTransaction owns commit start truth.
Initial confirmation-pending settlement belongs to commit.
Initial ambiguous reconciliation pending is emitted by commit before worker follow-up.
Immediate authoritative confirmation belongs to commit.
Ambiguous commit outcomes originate in commit logic and are later reconciled by 292.
Ongoing confirmation-truth convergence belongs to reconciliation and dispute handling.
AppointmentRecord creation belongs to authoritative commit success.
Reminder scheduling belongs to ReminderPlan orchestration.
Cancel mutations belong to appointment management commands.
Reschedule start belongs to appointment management commands.
Waitlist entry creation belongs to the smart waitlist track.
Deadline evaluation belongs to smart waitlist logic.
Waitlist offers belong to smart waitlist logic.
Waitlist offer acceptance belongs to waitlist truth and continuation logic.
Waitlist offer expiry belongs to waitlist truth and deadline logic.
Waitlist offer supersession belongs to waitlist truth and deadline logic.
Fallback obligation belongs to waitlist and no-supply continuation logic.
Typed callback fallback is decided by waitlist and fallback obligation truth before staff handling.
Typed hub fallback is decided by waitlist and fallback obligation truth before staff handling.
BookingExceptionQueue ownership belongs to assisted booking and exception handling.

invalidationChains.title: Capability tuple drift
invalidationChains.summary: Any matrix, trust, publication, linkage, or governing-object drift supersedes stale search, offer, selection, manage, and command state.
invalidationChains.law: Capability tuple drift invalidates stale snapshots, offers, selected slots, manage views, and command drafts.

invalidationChains.title: Snapshot expiry without provenance loss
invalidationChains.summary: Expired snapshots freeze selection and commit paths while preserving evidence and anchor provenance.
invalidationChains.law: Snapshot expiry invalidates selection and commit paths without erasing provenance.

invalidationChains.title: Reservation, confirmation, and manage cohesion
invalidationChains.summary: Reservation truth, confirmation truth, appointment record, manage exposure, reminder posture, and reconciliation state cannot drift apart.
invalidationChains.law: Reservation truth, confirmation truth, and manage exposure cannot drift apart.

invalidationChains.title: Route publication and continuity freeze
invalidationChains.summary: Publication, embedded session, or continuity evidence drift freezes stale booking mutation in the same shell.
invalidationChains.law: Route publication, embedded session, or continuity-evidence drift freezes stale booking mutation in the same shell.

invalidationChains.title: Typed waitlist and fallback obligation chain
invalidationChains.summary: No-supply, deadline, fallback, callback, hub handoff, and assisted-booking branches remain typed and owner-bound.
invalidationChains.law: Waitlist and fallback obligations remain typed dependencies rather than improvised later branches.

tracks.title: Executable BookingCase kernel and durable intent lineage
tracks.readinessReason: Ready now because 278 froze the case kernel, 279 froze capability inputs, 280 froze downstream typed seams, and 281 forbids 282 from claiming slot or capability ownership.
mergeCriteria: Schema fields and state vocabulary must remain byte-compatible with 278.
Migrations must preserve replayable BookingIntent lineage and append-only transition audit.
Event emission must use the 281 owner remap and never emit slot, offer, reminder, waitlist, or reconciliation events from 282.
Stale decision epoch, stale request lease, and identity-repair freeze tests must fail closed.
Telemetry and audit output must remain PHI-safe on case transition surfaces.

tracks.title: Executable capability matrix compiler and tuple resolution engine
tracks.readinessReason: Ready now because 279 froze the tuple law and 281 explicitly blocks 283 from redefining BookingCase or slot semantics while allowing a parallel compile-and-resolve path.
mergeCriteria: Schema fields, capability states, and tuple hash inputs must remain byte-compatible with 279.
Binding compilation must name exactly one current adapter profile, degradation profile, and confirmation gate policy.
Capability tuple supersession must invalidate stale resolutions without widening patient action scope.
Blocked reasons and fallback actions must remain machine-readable for downstream UI and support tracks.
Telemetry and diagnostics must stay PHI-safe and reason-code based.

tracks.title: Slot search, normalization, and availability snapshot pipeline
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 282 publishes durable case creation and 283 publishes live capability resolution queries for the exact tuple.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs executable BookingCase and capability-query surfaces before snapshot production is lawful.
mergeCriteria: Must consume 282 and 283 surfaces instead of recreating case or capability truth locally.

tracks.title: Slot scoring, offer orchestration, and selection rules
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 284 publishes canonical snapshot and candidate-index truth.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 284 snapshot production and freshness law.
mergeCriteria: Must keep truthful non-exclusive offer posture distinct from reservation authority.

tracks.title: Reservation authority, soft hold, and real hold flows
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 285 owns ranked offer sessions and truthful selection semantics.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs offer-session ownership and ranking proof from 285.
mergeCriteria: Must not let selected state imply held state before reservation truth exists.

tracks.title: Commit path, revalidation, appointment record, and compensation logic
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 286 publishes hold and reservation truth that commit can lawfully revalidate and consume.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs reservation authority and truthful hold inputs from 286.
mergeCriteria: Must be the only owner of commit-path state and initial authoritative appointment creation.

tracks.title: Appointment management cancel, reschedule, and detail update commands
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 287 publishes appointment truth and 283 publishes live manage exposure truth.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs booked appointment truth from 287 and capability projection from 283.
mergeCriteria: Must preserve same-shell continuity and never infer manage exposure from appointment presence alone.

tracks.title: Reminder scheduler and notification settlement
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 287 creates authoritative AppointmentRecord and 288 owns reminder-change manage settlement.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs appointment truth and manage mutation settlement.
mergeCriteria: Must keep reminder schedule truth separate from manage command and appointment truth.

tracks.title: Smart waitlist, transactional autofill, and deadline logic
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until no-supply, unavailable, and commit ambiguity branches are emitted by 286 and 287.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs reservation and commit truth before autofill and fallback obligations are legal.
mergeCriteria: Must keep waitlist and fallback typed instead of branching from generic booking failure.

tracks.title: Staff-assisted booking exception queue and handoff panel API
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 290 emits typed fallback obligations and 287/288 publish the exception-causing booking truth.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs waitlist/fallback truth and commit/manage exception inputs.
mergeCriteria: Must consume fallback obligations instead of inventing a second assisted-booking branch model.

tracks.title: Booking reconciliation and external confirmation dispute worker
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 287 emits ambiguous or pending confirmation states and 290/291 publish fallback and exception paths that the worker may settle.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs commit outputs, exception signals, and fallback branches before reconciliation can converge truth.
mergeCriteria: Must be the only ongoing owner of confirmation-truth convergence after initial commit settlement.

tracks.title: Patient appointment scheduling workspace
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until the core backend booking path exists end to end; otherwise the workspace would simulate booking truth locally.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs executable backend booking truth from 282 to 292.
mergeCriteria: Must render from authoritative capability, snapshot, offer, and confirmation projections rather than local heuristics.

tracks.title: Slot search results and freshness states
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 293 establishes the patient booking shell and 284/285 publish snapshot and ranking truth.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs patient workspace shell and backend snapshot truth.
mergeCriteria: Must render freshness and stale states from snapshot recovery, not route-local timers.

tracks.title: Offer selection flow with truthful hold posture
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until offer and reservation truth exist together.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 286 reservation truth on top of 294 search results.
mergeCriteria: Must keep selected and held postures distinct and consume reservation truth exactly.

tracks.title: Confirmation pending, disputed, and recovery states
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 287 and 292 publish authoritative confirmation and dispute truth.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs commit and reconciliation truth.
mergeCriteria: Must never treat accepted-for-processing as booked truth.

tracks.title: Appointment detail, cancel, reschedule, and reminder views
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until appointment truth, manage settlement, and reminder scheduling exist.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 288 and 289 backend manage/reminder implementation plus 296 confirmation recovery.
mergeCriteria: Must render manage exposure only from capability, continuity, and confirmation truth together.

tracks.title: Waitlist enrolment, management, and offer acceptance views
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 290 publishes waitlist truth and 297 publishes appointment detail continuity.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 290 waitlist runtime and 297 manage/detail continuity.
mergeCriteria: Must consume typed waitlist and fallback reasons instead of inventing local continuation meaning.

tracks.title: Staff booking handoff panel and assisted booking views
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until 291 publishes assisted-booking API truth and 298 publishes waitlist continuation context.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs backend assisted-booking and waitlist truth before staff UI can be honest.
mergeCriteria: Must remain a projection over 291-owned backend truth, not a second assisted-booking state machine.

tracks.title: Record-origin continuation and booking entry surfaces
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until the patient and staff booking entry routes exist.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 293, 297, and 299 to land core entry surfaces first.
mergeCriteria: Must consume established route registry and continuity evidence instead of inventing new entry anchors.

tracks.title: Patient action recovery envelopes for booking failures
tracks.readinessReason: Blocked until confirmation recovery, waitlist continuity, and entry continuation surfaces exist.
tracks.blockedReason: Needs 296, 298, and 300 before recovery envelopes can be coherent.
mergeCriteria: Must preserve same-shell recovery law from 280 instead of inventing detached failure pages.

tracks.title: Mobile responsive booking and manage flows
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred until the core desktop booking and recovery routes are implemented and stable enough to harden responsively.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred behind core route implementation.
mergeCriteria: This is polish and device hardening, not a prerequisite for the first backend implementation wave.

tracks.title: Accessibility and artifact parity for booking documents
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred until appointment detail, recovery envelopes, and core artifact generation exist.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred behind core manage, recovery, and artifact generation work.
mergeCriteria: Artifact accessibility hardening follows core artifact generation; it does not unblock the first backend wave.

tracks.title: Configure provider sandboxes and callback endpoints
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred because 277 and 281 explicitly keep live-provider activation outside the first local-booking implementation wave.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred by live-provider scope boundary.
mergeCriteria: Live supplier onboarding remains later and simulator-backed seams must not be relabeled as ready.

tracks.title: Capture provider capability evidence and test credentials
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred because provider evidence cannot exist before live sandbox onboarding and remains outside the first local-booking wave.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred by live-provider scope boundary.
mergeCriteria: Evidence capture is intentionally later than local implementation readiness.

tracks.title: Integrate local booking with triage, portal, and notification workflows
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred because integration should consume stable runtime and provider evidence rather than shaping the first local implementation wave.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred behind provider onboarding and full frontend/runtime completion.
mergeCriteria: Integration remains later than local backend kernel and capability delivery.

tracks.title: Capability matrix, slot snapshot, hold, commit, and compensation suites
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred until the backend runtime path and integration path exist; assurance cannot lead implementation here.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred until runtime implementation exists.
mergeCriteria: Core suite work follows implementation and integration, not vice versa.

tracks.title: Manage, waitlist, assisted booking, and reconciliation suites
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred until the later backend and frontend tracks land.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred until manage, waitlist, assisted, and reconciliation work exists.
mergeCriteria: Assurance remains later than the tracks it proves.

tracks.title: Patient and staff booking end-to-end, accessibility, and load suites
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred until the end-to-end runtime and UI surface exists.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred until prior implementation and assurance waves finish.
mergeCriteria: End-to-end proof is a final-wave activity.

tracks.title: Phase 4 exit gate approve booking engine completion
tracks.readinessReason: Deferred because exit approval follows all implementation, provider, integration, and assurance work.
tracks.blockedReason: Deferred until all prior tracks complete.
mergeCriteria: Exit approval is the end of the programme wave, not the start.
